allow: PowerShell($proj = "d:\\JonoFiles\\Projects\\01_Business\\Spinning_Monkey_Studios\\02_Active_Projects\\Manifested_Fit"; if \(-not \(Test-Path "$proj\\07_Deploy\\targets\\wp-plugins\\config.json"\)\) { $cfg = Get-Content "$proj\\07_Deploy\\targets\\prod\\config.json" -Raw | ConvertFrom-Json; $rp = \([string]$cfg.sitePublish.remotePath\).TrimEnd\('/'\); $cfg.sitePublish.remotePath = "$rp/blog/wp-content/plugins"; $cfg.sitePublish.localRoot = "03_Website/wordpress/plugins"; New-Item -ItemType Directory -Force "$proj\\07_Deploy\\targets\\wp-plugins" | Out-Null; \($cfg | ConvertTo-Json -Depth 4\) | Out-File "$proj\\07_Deploy\\targets\\wp-plugins\\config.json" -Encoding utf8 }; & "$proj\\07_Deploy\\tools\\publish-ftp-files.ps1" -ConfigPath "$proj\\07_Deploy\\targets\\wp-plugins\\config.json" -Files "manifested-fit-content-engine/manifested-fit-content-engine.php","manifested-fit-affiliates/manifested-fit-affiliates.php")

PowerShell($proj = "d:\\JonoFiles\\Projects\\01_Business\\Spinning_Monkey_Studios\\02_Active_Projects\\Manifested_Fit"; $cfg = \(Get-Content "$proj\\07_Deploy\\targets\\wp-plugins\\config.json" -Raw | ConvertFrom-Json\).sitePublish; $cred = "$\($cfg.username\):$\($cfg.password\)"; $base = 'ftp://' + \([Uri]$cfg.baseUrl\).Authority; $rr = '/' + $cfg.remotePath.Trim\('/'\); $lr = Join-Path $proj \($cfg.localRoot -replace '/', '\\'\); foreach \($rel in @\('manifested-fit-affiliates/manifested-fit-affiliates.php','manifested-fit-content-engine/manifested-fit-content-engine.php'\)\) { $tmp = Join-Path $env:TEMP \([IO.Path]::GetRandomFileName\(\)\); & curl.exe --silent --fail --user $cred --ssl-reqd --ssl-no-revoke "$base$rr/$rel" -o $tmp; $lh = \(Get-FileHash \(Join-Path $lr \($rel -replace '/','\\'\)\)\).Hash; $rh = \(Get-FileHash $tmp\).Hash; Remove-Item $tmp -Force; Write-Host "$rel : $\(if \($lh -eq $rh\) {'MATCH'} else {'MISMATCH'}\)" })
